bounty_title: Prove a substantial runx bug with a failing test

bug.title: Windows receipt store uses raw sha256 receipt ids as filenames
bug.observed_error: receipt store is unreadable: 参数错误。 (os error 87)
bug.distinct_from: No matching existing runxhq/runx issue found for receipt store Windows/os error 87 searches before filing upstream issue #74.

reproduction.expected_when_fixed: Exit 0 and create at least one .json receipt file under .tmp/receipts/
reproduction.observed_output: {"error":{"code":"skill_error","message":"receipt store is unreadable: 参数错误。 (os error 87)"},"status":"failure"}

root_cause.why: The function returns `<receipt_id>.json` and rejects slash characters but does not encode or reject `:`. Receipt ids commonly begin with `sha256:`, producing Windows-invalid filenames.
